text:
- Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
HEARIM_COMBINED_EVER Deafness and Hearing Impairment - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEARIM_MEDICAID_EVER Deafness and Hearing Impairment - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEARIM_MEDICARE_EVER Deafness and Hearing Impairment - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date -
